action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 10 failed because train.py tried to resume from checkpoints/resmlp.pt, but that checkpoint lacks an 'optimizer' key (older save format). Analysis: The model weights are valuable (10 epochs, test mean_r2=0.5206). I should make train.py robust to partial checkpoints—load model weights regardless, start a fresh optimizer if needed, and strip any '_orig_mod.' prefix. Decision: Rewrite train.py with robust resume logic, AMP, and full checkpoint saving. Resume training from resmlp.pt for epochs 11–30 (20 more epochs, ~50 min). Submit eval immediately after training using the same checkpoint path.
